pattern: Assigning each parenthesis to one of two groups by the parity of its nesting depth splits the load evenly, halving the deepest nesting either group must carry.
hints: Whatever you do, the deepest group cannot beat half of the original maximum depth, so aim to share the deep levels alternately.
Track the current open-paren depth as you scan; route levels to group 0 or group 1 based on whether that depth is even or odd.
On an open paren increment depth then label by depth parity; on a close paren label by parity first then decrement, so matching parens land in the same group.

edge_inputs.description: deeply nested chain splits across both groups
flat run of pairs all fit in one group

stress.description: random valid parentheses strings of moderate length
stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    # build a random VPS by a balanced random walk that never goes negative
    n = max(1, size)
    pairs = n
    open_left = pairs
    close_pending = 0
    out = []
    while open_left > 0 or close_pending > 0:
        if open_left > 0 and (close_pending == 0 or rng.random() < 0.5):
            out.append('(')
            open_left -= 1
            close_pending += 1
        else:
            out.append(')')
            close_pending -= 1
    return [''.join(out)]
stress.note: generator guarantees a balanced, never-negative parentheses string
